en_title: Splatoon Raiders Preview: Turns Out It’s Kind of a Roguelite
cn_title: 原来是Roguelite：《斯普拉遁 涂击队》试玩
subtitle: 这味儿对了
opus_summary: 《斯普拉遁 涂击队》是一款带持续成长的Roguelite单人冒险。试玩版的探索、配装、机器人搭档和四人合作都表现顺手，重复循环也有足够变化。

paragraphs.en: It is a truth universally acknowledged that a multiplayer game in possession of a passionate fanbase must be in want of a single-player game. So it is, and so it was, and so, I think, it ever will be. Enter Splatoon Raiders, a single-player (well, mostly…we’ll get there) joint from Nintendo because the ever-dedicated Splatoon fans are insatiable. But here’s the good news, squid kids: it seems to be shaping up real nice, at least from the couple hours I spent with it.
paragraphs.cn: 一款多人游戏只要拥有热情粉丝，就必然会需要一款单人游戏，这大概是一条举世公认的真理。过去如此，现在如此，我想未来也会如此。于是《斯普拉遁 涂击队》来了。这是任天堂为永远吃不饱的《斯普拉遁》铁粉准备的一款单人游戏，呃，大体上是单人，后面会说到。但好消息是，各位鱿鱼小子：至少从我玩到的这几个小时来看，它成型得相当不错。

paragraphs.en: My demo started off with a cutscene to set things up. My character was a helicopter pilot (but my friends call me Mechanic) flying treasure hunters Frye, Big Man, and Shiver to the Spirhalite Islands when they all saw a big ol’ light coming out of what looked like a hurricane. Things went sideways real fast, and our copter went down. One month later, we’ve built a floating fortress with just about everything you could want except a way home and we’re hunting for treasure. When in Rome, right?
paragraphs.cn: 我的试玩从一段交代背景的过场动画开始。我的角色是一名直升机飞行员，不过朋友们都叫我「机械师」。我正载着寻宝者Frye、Big Man和Shiver前往螺旋光岛(Spirhalite Islands)，这时所有人都看见一道巨大的光从看起来像飓风的东西里射出。事情很快失控，我们的直升机坠毁了。一个月后，我们建起了一座漂浮堡垒，里面几乎什么都有，唯独没有回家的办法，于是我们开始寻宝。入乡随俗嘛，对吧？

paragraphs.en: Soon enough, I was setting off to hunt for treasure. If you’ve ever played Splatoon before, you’ll feel right at home in Raiders. I started with the gyro controls, and while that normally isn’t my bag, it’s Splatoon and they feel great here. Pretty soon I was doing Splatoon things: inking up the environment, swimming around in it, and collecting Mysterious Shards; I’m not being cheeky. This is what they’re called. Movement in Splatoon is a joy, and that’s no different in Raiders. Even something as simple as using a wooden plank to surf across the waves is awesome. As I moved forward, I came across my enemy: the Salmonids. They start small, these deranged fishy critters. But the solution, no matter their size, is to ink ‘em up and paint over the ugly goo they leave on the ground. Theirs? Hideous, yellow. Likely stinky. Mine? Beautiful. Green. Probably smells like lavender. They just can’t handle that squid kid firepower, but you’re doing the environment a favor, too. When they go down, they drop eggs that’ll come in handy later, but I don’t fall in love with the goofy goobers until I see one that looks like a fat version of that one hyena from The Lion King with the droopy tongue. He’s called Salty Tongue, and I love him. He gets the ink, too, and drops a fancy weapon (more on that later).
paragraphs.cn: 没过多久，我就出发寻宝了。如果你以前玩过《斯普拉遁》，那么在《涂击队》里会很快找到熟悉感。我一开始使用体感瞄准，虽然这通常不是我的菜，但这是《斯普拉遁》，它在这里手感很好。很快我就在做那些《斯普拉遁》式的事情：给环境涂墨，在墨里游来游去，收集神秘碎片(Mysterious Shards)；我不是在耍嘴皮子，它们真的就叫这个。《斯普拉遁》的移动本来就是一种乐趣，《涂击队》也没有例外。哪怕只是踩着一块木板在浪上冲浪这么简单的动作，也很爽。继续前进时，我遇到了敌人：鲑鱼族(Salmonids)。它们一开始体型很小，是一群疯疯癫癫的鱼形小东西。但不管大小，解决办法都一样：把它们涂满墨，再把它们留在地上的丑陋黏液盖过去。它们的？难看，黄色，大概率还臭。我的？漂亮，绿色，可能闻起来像薰衣草。它们根本扛不住鱿鱼小子的火力，而且你也顺手帮了环境一个忙。它们倒下后会掉落之后派得上用场的鱼卵，但真正让我喜欢上这些傻乎乎小东西的，是我看见一只长得像《狮子王》里那只耷拉舌头鬣狗的肥胖版。它叫Salty Tongue，我爱它。它也挨了一通墨，还掉了一把花哨武器，后面会讲。

paragraphs.en: After that, I stumble upon a cute little robot that the crew hauls back to the hideout and the Mechanic manages to fix up. From there, it’s time to take that bad boy out on a mission and kick the tires. My mission plays out a lot like the first level. Run around, explore the environment, fight Salmonids, ink things up. The difference this time is that I’ve got my handy-dandy bot piloted by Big Man. The bot is helpful in combat, but it can also boost me up in the air so I can glide to new places and leap to where I tell it, splattering the ground with ink. Lovely.
paragraphs.cn: 之后，我偶然发现了一个可爱的小机器人，队伍把它拖回藏身处，机械师设法把它修好了。接下来就该带这家伙出任务，看看它到底好不好用了。我的任务流程和第一关很像：到处跑，探索环境，和鲑鱼族战斗，把东西涂满墨。不同的是，这次我有一个由Big Man驾驶的好用机器人。机器人在战斗中很有帮助，也能把我弹到空中，让我滑翔到新地点，还能跳向我指定的位置，把地面溅满墨。漂亮。

paragraphs.en: The bot’s real trick, however, is that it can drill into big crystals and get us more of those sweet, sweet Mysterious Shards and other goodies. The crystals themselves shoot these big ol’ beams of light into the sky, so you know where they are. The trick is using your tools (like the bot jump, or flowers that blast you up into the air, or your ability to swim through ink) to get where you’re going, murking Salmonids along the way. If things get hairy, the bot and your buddy inside of it give you access to Showstoppers if you get enough of them Salmonid eggs. With Big Man, that means he hops out of your mech and you ride that bad boy like he’s a horse while he’s blasting away, John Woo-style. It’s great. Salmonids don’t like it much, though.
paragraphs.cn: 不过机器人的真正本事，是能钻进大型水晶，为我们挖出更多甜美的神秘碎片和其他好东西。水晶本身会向天空射出巨大的光束，所以你知道它们在哪。关键在于利用你的工具，比如机器人跳跃、把你轰上天的花，或者你在墨中游动的能力，到达目的地，并在路上干掉鲑鱼族。如果局面变得棘手，只要你收集到足够的鲑鱼族鱼卵，机器人和里面的伙伴就能让你使用Showstopper。Big Man的Showstopper会让他跳出机甲，而你像骑马一样骑着这家伙，他则以吴宇森风格一路开火。这很棒。鲑鱼族大概就不怎么喜欢了。

paragraphs.en: At the end of the level, I find a huge crystal protected by Salmonids who are popping out of a nearby grate to defend it. Between me and my bot, it wasn’t a big thing. They got the ink, but it was a lot of fun anyway just because Raiders always feels good as you play it. My reward for Salmonid slaughter? A big treasure chest full of new ink tanks: Speed, Power, and Tactical. The neat part about these tanks is they each come with different gadgets that provide cool and new abilities in combat. The Speed tank, for instance, gives me Blast Boot, which allows me to yeet myself through the air and land with a big splat that damages everything around me, while the Tactical Tank offers the a-turret-by-any-other-name-still-shoots-just-as-good Shot Pot. Neat. Of course, there are cooldowns attached to all of these abilities because video games are only allowed to be fun sometimes, but still, I dig it.
paragraphs.cn: 关卡末尾，我发现一块巨大的水晶，附近格栅里不断冒出的鲑鱼族正在保护它。有我和机器人在，这不是什么大问题。它们挨了墨，但整个过程仍然很有趣，因为《涂击队》玩起来始终手感很好。屠鲑鱼族的奖励是什么？一个大宝箱，里面装满新的墨水罐：速度型、力量型和战术型。这些墨水罐有意思的地方在于，它们各自附带不同装置，能在战斗中提供酷炫的新能力。比如速度型墨水罐给了我Blast Boot，可以把自己猛地抛向空中，再以一大团墨砸落，对周围所有东西造成伤害；战术型墨水罐则提供了Shot Pot，说白了就是换个名字也照样好用的炮塔。不错。当然，所有这些能力都有冷却时间，因为电子游戏只被允许偶尔好玩一下，但我还是喜欢。

paragraphs.en: After another mission, where I grab some more weapons and other goodies, and discover the joy of floating, I head back to base to sort through my wonderful tools. In addition to my tanks and the gadgets that go with them, I’ve also got gadget parts, which do things like juice the explosions on your gadget abilities or make them bigger, shorten cooldowns, add explosions to your charge abilities, and the like – provided you have enough slots to equip that gadget part. You also gain levels as you play, which can be spent to upgrade your health, weapon damage, and gadget part slots, and even craft new gadgets. I was particularly fond of the Power Tank’s Spatellites, which orbit you and spray ink everywhere, and the Bombloons, which are bomb balloons you can connect and do absolutely massive damage when you blow them up. Then, of course, there are various weapons to collect, like the Oil Blaster and Roller, all of which can be upgraded at your base. Finally, you’ve got Salmonid Relics, which grant bonuses like a double jump or reduce weapon ink consumption. It’s a lot of customization, but it means you get to build a character you like, and you can get truly overpowered if y ou play it right. You can also just hang out and vibe at your base and read lore about the Salmonids and the world, too . No pressure.
paragraphs.cn: 又完成一个任务后，我拿到更多武器和其他好东西，也发现了漂浮的快乐，然后回到基地整理这些美妙工具。除了墨水罐及其配套装置，我还有装置零件，它们可以强化装置能力的爆炸、扩大范围、缩短冷却时间、给蓄力能力追加爆炸等等，前提是你有足够插槽来装备这些零件。游玩过程中你也会升级，等级点数可以用来提升生命值、武器伤害和装置零件插槽，甚至制作新装置。我尤其喜欢力量型墨水罐的Spatellites，它们会围着你旋转并到处喷墨；还有Bombloons，也就是可以连接在一起的炸弹气球，引爆时能造成极其巨大的伤害。当然，还有各种可收集武器，比如Oil Blaster和Roller，所有武器都能在基地升级。最后，你还会获得鲑鱼族遗物(Salmonid Relics)，它们能提供二段跳、降低武器耗墨等加成。自定义内容很多，但这也意味着你能搭出自己喜欢的角色，如果玩得对，甚至可以变得真正强到离谱。你也可以只是待在基地放松一下，读读关于鲑鱼族和这个世界的设定。没压力。

paragraphs.en: Then you head out on a mission and do it all again. Turns out, Splatoon Raiders is kind of a roguelite with persistent progression. Who knew? But it does give you an opportunity to try out all of your wonderful toys and things like Shiver’s Show =stopper, which summons a giant rocket-powered shark (yes, really) that blasts through anything unlucky enough to get in your way. And, based on what I played, Raiders seems to be trying to do enough that while your core action – blast through Salmonids and get stuff, rinse and repeat – is the same, things always feel different enough that it stays interesting.
paragraphs.cn: 然后你出任务，把这一切再来一遍。结果发现，《斯普拉遁 涂击队》其实是一款带持续成长的Roguelite。谁能想到呢？不过它确实给了你机会去尝试所有这些美妙玩具，以及Shiver的Showstopper之类的东西。后者会召唤一条由火箭驱动的巨鲨，没错，真的如此，把所有不幸挡在你路上的东西轰穿。根据我的试玩体验，《涂击队》似乎做了足够多的变化，所以即便核心行动始终是「轰穿鲑鱼族、拿东西、冲洗再重复」，每次玩起来仍然都有足够差异，能保持趣味。

paragraphs.en: All of Splatoon Raders’ craziness comes to a head in raids that take us underground, where I’m trapped in a small space and have to collect a certain number of Salmonid eggs in a limited time to make it to the next level. I won’t lie to you, friends, I thought I was kinda nice at Splatoon Raiders until this point. I was cruisin’. So when I tell you I got smoked multiple times in a row doing this, I’m not kidding. But man, I dug it. It forced me to refine my build, pick my spots, use all my tools, and learn how to play fast. Even when I was getting whalloped, I was having a good time. Finally making it to that last level and beating the boss just as our time for that portion of the demo expired? My friends, I exhaled .
paragraphs.cn: 《斯普拉遁 涂击队》的疯狂在突袭关卡中达到高潮。突袭会把我们带到地下，我被困在一个狭小空间里，必须在限定时间内收集一定数量的鲑鱼族鱼卵，才能进入下一层。朋友们，我不骗你们，在这之前我还觉得自己挺会玩《涂击队》的，一路顺风顺水。所以当我说自己在这里连续被打爆好几次时，我不是开玩笑。但老实说，我很喜欢。它迫使我打磨构筑、选择时机、用上所有工具，并学会快速游玩。哪怕被揍得很惨，我也玩得很开心。终于在这部分试玩时间结束前抵达最后一层并击败Boss的那一刻，朋友们，我长舒了一口气。

paragraphs.en: And then we got to play four player co-op, and it was rad. Nothing really changes in co-op. It’s just more of the same, but with friends. I named my squid kid John Ink, and we got to work. I don’t have much to say about the multiplayer – we only got about ten minutes with it – except that you can go real fast if you want to and it’s an absolute blast to play with all those gadgets and guns and Showstoppers popping off at once. I had a great time, and this would definitely be my preferred way to play in the full game. John Ink shall ride again.
paragraphs.cn: 然后我们玩到了四人合作，太爽了。合作模式里其实没什么变化，只是同样的东西加上朋友。我给自己的鱿鱼小子取名John Ink，然后我们开工。我对多人部分没太多可说的，因为我们只玩了大约10分钟。除了如果你愿意可以跑得非常快，以及所有装置、枪械和Showstopper同时爆发时玩起来绝对痛快之外，我能说的不多。我玩得很开心，这绝对会是正式版里我偏好的玩法。John Ink还会再次出击。

paragraphs.en: I didn’t know what to expect with Splatoon Raiders, but I’d be lying if I said it wasn’t a good time. It can be breezy, it can be challenging, it can be everything in-between. I’m kind of shocked that it’s basically a roguelite, but it works real good. Turns out all a squid kid needs for a good time on the Spirhalite Islands is a treasure to hunt, and a robot to hunt it with. Not bad, considering it starts with a helicopter crash. But bring some friends if you can. It’s better when you’re all spilling some ink together. Maybe the real treasure is the friends we made along the way?
paragraphs.cn: 我原本不知道该对《斯普拉遁 涂击队》期待什么，但如果说它不好玩，那就是撒谎。它可以轻松，可以有挑战，也可以介于两者之间。我有点震惊它基本上就是一款Roguelite，但它运作得非常好。事实证明，鱿鱼小子想在螺旋光岛上玩得开心，只需要一份可追寻的宝藏，以及一个一起寻宝的机器人。考虑到故事是从直升机坠毁开始的，这已经不差了。但如果可以，带上朋友吧。大家一起泼墨时会更好玩。也许真正的宝藏，就是我们一路上交到的朋友？

pending_dict.note: 游戏地名，暂无词库条目，按构词与语境暂译
《斯普拉遁》敌人族群，建议用户确认固定译名
游戏收集物，按字面暂译
